artPrompt: An evocative scene of the midway itself bending to an unbreakable rule: dice and coins curving through the air toward a glowing hot-gold center as if pulled by gravity, rigged wheels tilting, ember sparks spiraling inward through carnival-red haze, tattered tents leaning under sickly neon and smoky black, an ongoing cosmic rigging rendered tender and ominous, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: The House Always Wins (It Is a Law of Physics Now)
text:
It is now a law of physics, like gravity, but ruder.
Whenever any player wins anything — a flip, a roll, a bet, an argument about whether that was a roll — the house wins it instead. You are the house. You were always the house. The other players were never not losing.
This card is legal in every format in which it is not banned (none). It cannot be banned, because to ban it you would have to win, and the house always wins.
flavorText: physicists confirmed it, then the house took their grant money

extras.selfAware: cannot be banned because that would require beating the house
